zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Harding於1468年出生在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 布羅姆利時，她的父親Sir Thomas Harding20歲，母親Margaret Oswald20歲。她於1483年與John Hewitt在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 布羅姆利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1536年2月17日在她的家鄉享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Harding was born in 1468, in Great Bromley, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Harding, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Oswald, was 20. She married John Hewitt in 1483, in Great Bromley, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 17 February 1536, in her hometown, at the age of 68.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Harding(이)가 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 브롬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Harding(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Oswald(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1483년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 브롬리에서 John Hewitt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1536년 2월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Harding родилась в 1468 г. в местности грит бромли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Harding было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Oswald, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hewitt в 1483 г. в местности грит бромли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 февраля 1536 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.
